name: kinematic-api
description: Kinematic Field Force Management — REST API

scripts.deploy: git add . && git commit -m "deploy: automatic update" && echo '🚀 Ready to push. Run: git push origin main'
scripts.deploy:direct: git add . && git commit -m "deploy: direct automated fix" || true; git push origin main && cd ../kinematic-dashboard && (git add . && git commit -m "deploy: direct automated fix" || true); git push origin main --force && cd ../Kinematic
